question: What are the distinct driver names who have driven vehicles with power more than 5000 ?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT driver.Name FROM driver JOIN vehicle_driver ON driver.Driver_ID = vehicle_driver.Driver_ID JOIN vehicle ON vehicle_driver.Vehicle_ID = vehicle.Vehicle_ID WHERE vehicle.Power > 5000;

back_translation.intent: 获取驾驶员姓名，其中他们驾驶的车辆功率超过5000

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题和SQL反向翻译描述均要求获取驾驶功率超过5000的驾驶员姓名，且未涉及聚合、分组、排序或限制条件。
